title: SBproxy Licensing Edits (Wave 4)
description: Audit-driven view of policy-graph projection refreshes (PolicyProjectionRefresh events) for the four Wave 4 projections (robots, llms, llms-full, licenses, tdmrep). Reads the audit ClickHouse view; counts doc-hash changes per week; flags the default-deny rollout signal (an RSL ai-use entry asserting licensed=false).

panels.title: Recent PolicyProjectionRefresh events
panels.description: Per-event audit table. Shows the wall-clock time, hostname, projection_kind, doc_hash (SHA-256 of the rendered body), byte_len, and config_version. Reads from the audit ClickHouse view; one row per (hostname, projection_kind) emitted at config-reload time.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toDateTime64(emitted_at, 3) AS time,
       tenant_id,
       hostname,
       projection_kind,
       config_version,
       byte_len,
       substring(doc_hash, 1, 12) AS doc_hash_short
  FROM admin_audit_events
 WHERE action = 'PolicyProjectionRefresh'
   AND tenant_id IN ($tenant_id)
   AND projection_kind IN ($projection_kind)
   AND emitted_at >= $__fromTime
   AND emitted_at < $__toTime
 ORDER BY emitted_at DESC
 LIMIT 200

panels.title: licenses.xml document hash changes per week
panels.description: Counter: number of distinct doc_hash values observed for the /licenses.xml projection per tenant per week. A non-zero value means the operator edited the licensing posture (content_signal + tier list) at least once that week.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT toStartOfWeek(emitted_at) AS time,
       tenant_id AS metric,
       count(DISTINCT doc_hash) AS hashes
  FROM admin_audit_events
 WHERE action = 'PolicyProjectionRefresh'
   AND projection_kind = 'licenses'
   AND tenant_id IN ($tenant_id)
   AND emitted_at >= $__fromTime
   AND emitted_at < $__toTime
 GROUP BY time, metric
 ORDER BY time

panels.title: Default-deny rollout signal
panels.description: Counts hostnames whose latest licenses.xml asserts <ai-use type=training licensed=false>. Per A4.1 this is the default-deny posture: an origin without a content_signal value lands here. Watch this number when rolling out a global default-deny policy; it should climb monotonically as operators opt out.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT count(DISTINCT hostname) AS default_deny_hostnames
  FROM admin_audit_events
 WHERE action = 'PolicyProjectionRefresh'
   AND projection_kind = 'licenses'
   AND tenant_id IN ($tenant_id)
   AND notLike(detail_json, '%"licensed":"true"%')
   AND emitted_at >= now() - INTERVAL 7 DAY
